message:
fix: rewrite connectors to properly parse real agent data formats

All three major connectors (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini) were failing to
index conversations because they expected different data formats than
what the agents actually produce. This resulted in ~0 search results
despite having ~1GB of Claude Code data, 1,211 Codex files, and 107
Gemini sessions.

## Root Causes

**Claude Code**: Expected flat JSON with i64 timestamps, but actual
JSONL files have nested `message.content[]` arrays (with text blocks
and tool_use blocks) and ISO-8601 string timestamps.

**Codex**: Expected simple JSONL but actual files use an envelope format
with `{type, timestamp, payload}` wrapper. Different entry types
(session_meta, response_item, event_msg) need different handling.

**Gemini**: Was parsing `logs.json` (only user messages) instead of
`chats/session-*.json` (full conversations). Also used `.as_i64()` for
timestamps but Gemini uses ISO-8601 strings.

## Changes

### src/connectors/mod.rs
- Added `parse_timestamp()`: handles both i64 millis and ISO-8601 strings
- Added `flatten_content()`: extracts text from string or array content
  (handles text blocks, tool_use blocks with names)

### src/connectors/claude_code.rs
- Fixed JSONL parsing to use nested `message.content` structure
- Fixed JSON parsing to use `parse_timestamp()` and `flatten_content()`
- Extracts workspace from `cwd` field in entries
- Extracts model name for author field

### src/connectors/codex.rs
- Complete rewrite for envelope format parsing
- Handles session_meta (extracts cwd), response_item (main messages),
  and event_msg (user_message, agent_reasoning) entry types
- Supports both modern .jsonl and legacy .json formats
- Extracts workspace from session metadata

### src/connectors/gemini.rs
- Fixed root path detection (was always using wrong directory)
- Created session_files() to find `chats/session-*.json` files
- Now parses proper session JSON with messages array
- Uses parse_timestamp() for ISO-8601 timestamps
- Extracts sessionId, projectHash, startTime, lastUpdated

### tests/connector_codex.rs
- Added comprehensive tests for new envelope format parsing

## Results

| Agent      | Before | After  |
|------------|--------|--------|
| Codex      | 0      | 1,204  |
| Claude Code| 0      | 340    |
| Gemini     | 1      | 76     |
| OpenCode   | 1      | 1      |

All test searches now work: "cma-es", "smartedgar", "soldier",
"matrix-completion", "gemini"

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
